errors.meaning: The Paperclip watchdog agent is consistently timing out at its 120s limit — it's doing too much work per run (fetching issues, filtering, formatting) and not completing in time. 1 consecutive error currently; historically alternates between ok and timeout.
errors.suggestedFix: Increase the job timeoutSeconds to 180 or reduce scope of each run (e.g. fetch fewer issues, skip activity feed check)

errors.meaning: The daily brief agent ran successfully and generated content, but the delivery to #daily-brief Slack channel failed. This has happened on 3 consecutive runs. The brief content itself is correct (flight day, Chase Zelle alert, stablecoin 0h flagged).
errors.suggestedFix: Check that the delivery target channel:C0AMSE2TW2X is correct and the Slack bot has write access to #daily-brief

errors.meaning: The infrastructure scan ran and found valid data (all versions current, MCP roadmap note) but failed to deliver to the #infrastructure channel. 1 consecutive error; same Slack write-access pattern as daily-brief.
errors.suggestedFix: Verify delivery channel config — job uses channel:C0ANLFZD1TJ; confirm bot has post permissions in #infrastructure
